snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Victory at King Power Stadium! | Leicester City vs Arsenal (1-3) | Premier League
snippet.description:
Watch the best of the match action as David Luiz, Alexandre Lacazette and Nicolas Pepe all got themselves on the scoresheet in an enjoyable 3-1 win over Leicester. 

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague

---

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Mesut Ozil, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Subscribe to the Official Arsenal YouTube Channel: https://arsn.al/youtube
Follow us on Facebook: https://arsn.al/facebook
Follow us on Twitter: https://arsn.al/twitter
Follow us on Instagram: https://arsn.al/instagram
Follow us on TikTok: https://arsn.al/tiktok

This is the Official YouTube channel for Arsenal Football Club.

For more match action, highlights and training videos, make sure you become a digital member and sign up to Arsenal Player. It's FREE and is the Home of the Game: https://arsn.al/arsenalplayer

Arsenal Football Club were formed in 1886 and amassed 13 League titles, 14 FA Cups. Some of their greatest players include: Thierry Henry, Dennis Bergkamp, Tony Adams, Ian Wright, Robert Pires, Liam Brady, Patrick Vieira, Cliff Bastin and Charlie George.

snippet.description:
Everton recorded a long overdue win at Anfield in the 238th Merseyside derby, with Richarlison and Gylfi Sigurdsson scoring in a 2-0 win over city rivals Liverpool.

snippet.title: Chelsea 0-0 Manchester United | Premier League Highlights
snippet.description:
Watch the highlights from Chelsea's Premier League home match against Manchester United. 

Download Chelsea FC's official mobile app:
-App Store https://apple.co/2vvlN9t
-Play Store http://bit.ly/2MfNJHX 

Subscribe: http://che.lc/YTsubscribe

To watch more EXCLUSIVE Chelsea content go to: http://che.lc/YTwebsite

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. It’s the only channel where you’ll get an authentic look at life at this great club. Every week we’ll be uploading fresh content from the training ground, our famous stadium and much, much more. Nowhere else will you get closer to world-class stars like Christian Pulisic, Kai Havertz, Hakim Ziyech, Timo Werner, N’Golo Kanté, Sam Kerr, Fran Kirby & Pernille Harder.

ABOUT CHELSEA FOOTBALL CLUB
Founded in 1905, Chelsea Football Club has a rich history, with its many successes including 5 Premier League titles, 8 FA Cups and 1 Champions League, secured on a memorable night in 2012. Famous former Blues include Peter Osgood, Gianfranco Zola, Frank Lampard, John Terry, Didier Drogba & Eden Hazard.

snippet.title: SHORT MEMORY (Episode 301) Mark Angel Comedy
snippet.description:
SHORT MEMORY (Episode 301) Mark Angel Comedy 

Watch as Aunty Success puts Uncle Kbrown in big trouble yet again as she makes him lose a girl who had promised him a job in her father's company if they went into a relationship. 

Krown and Baze 10 helped Aunty Success with her homework, but it turns out that they both could not solve the math problem they claimed was simple and as a result, the teacher scored Aunty Success Zero. 

Aunty Success unhappy about this decision to pay Kbrown back the easy way, and made a call that would later destroy Kbrown's one change to finally making it big in life. Watch to find out what she said on the said one call and when you find out, be sure to leave a comment/like and share this video with your family and friends.

Please don't forget to subscribe to Mark Angel Comedy Official YouTube Channel and turn on NOTIFICATION:
http://goo.gl/gnzgW3
http://www.youtube.com/MarkAngelComedy
GOD BLESS YOU, WE LOVE YOU. Enjoy!


#MarkAngelComedy #Emanuella #Success

localized.title: SHORT MEMORY (Episode 301) Mark Angel Comedy
localized.description:
SHORT MEMORY (Episode 301) Mark Angel Comedy 

Watch as Aunty Success puts Uncle Kbrown in big trouble yet again as she makes him lose a girl who had promised him a job in her father's company if they went into a relationship. 

Krown and Baze 10 helped Aunty Success with her homework, but it turns out that they both could not solve the math problem they claimed was simple and as a result, the teacher scored Aunty Success Zero. 

Aunty Success unhappy about this decision to pay Kbrown back the easy way, and made a call that would later destroy Kbrown's one change to finally making it big in life. Watch to find out what she said on the said one call and when you find out, be sure to leave a comment/like and share this video with your family and friends.

Please don't forget to subscribe to Mark Angel Comedy Official YouTube Channel and turn on NOTIFICATION:
http://goo.gl/gnzgW3
http://www.youtube.com/MarkAngelComedy
GOD BLESS YOU, WE LOVE YOU. Enjoy!


#MarkAngelComedy #Emanuella #Success

snippet.title: WITCH BIRD (Mark Angel Comedy) (Episode 300)
snippet.description:
WITCH BIRD (Mark Angel Comedy) (Episode 300)

This is a documentary about the Mark Angel Family, So we just hit episode 300 on Mark Angel Comedy! 

This has got us so excited looking at how far we have gone in putting smiles on the faces of people so we decided that showing you all the real life of the Mark Angel Family would be a great, gratifying, and exciting idea, and here we are!

In this video, you will learn about everything you need to know about the Mark Angel Family, from what they eat to where they live and how they live! 

So sit back and relax and enjoy, and when you are done watching, do not forget to leave a comment about what you think of the life of the Mark Angel Family and also share the video with your family and friends so they could also watch, enjoy and share their takes.

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3111 - Full Episode - 26th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3111: 
-----------------------
All the male members of Gokuldham Society have come to meet Jethalal. At Jethalal's place, everyone gets to know that Bapu Ji knows everything about the problem with Ramson company. Everyone offers Jethalal a small amount to help him but Jethalal informs them that Bapu Ji has given him the idea to deal with this problem. Bapu Ji has suggested selling their ancestral land. Sunder call Jethalal to give the good news that he has got the buyer for the land. Catch the fun and watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Oondha Chashma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in ""Gokuldham Co-operative Society"" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around Jethalal (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Tarak Mehta (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. Jethalal finds a friend and philosopher in Tarak Mehta and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalal's family includes his simpleton wife Daya Ben (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son Tapu (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members residing in the Gokuldham Society. They have often warned Jethalal to reform Tapu or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | CITY 2-1 WEST HAM | BEST OFFENCE IS DEFENCE
snippet.description:
City had to work hard to see off a stubborn and determined West Ham at the Etihad and record a 20th win on the bounce.
Goals from Ruben Dias and John Stones either side of an Antonio equaliser gave City a 2-1 win which extends our lead at the top - ahead of this weekend's fixtures - to 13.

It also means we are now 27 matches unbeaten - one short of equalling the Club record of 28.

For all the latest post-match reaction, visit https://www.mancity.com/

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3113 - Full Episode - 2nd March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3113: 
-----------------------
Sunder arrives with Baka and another one of his friends at the Gada household and also brings sweets with him to celebrate the occasion of selling the plot. But Jethalal is still in a solemn mood. Jetha informs everyone of his plan to not go ahead with the sale of his plot. He explains why he came up with this change of heart and how his dream helped in changing the decision. Catch the fun and watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Oondha Chashma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in ""Gokuldham Co-operative Society"" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around Jethalal (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Tarak Mehta (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. Jethalal finds a friend and philosopher in Tarak Mehta and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalal's family includes his simpleton wife Daya Ben (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son Tapu (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members residing in the Gokuldham Society. They have often warned Jethalal to reform Tapu or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by

Episode 3112: 
-----------------------
After Jethalal informs everyone about the good news from Sundar, everyone goes to sleep. Later on, while Jethalal is sleeping, his grandfather, Jayantilal, comes into his dreams and warns him of the danger that lies ahead.
